postReview.title: Aston Villa 1-0 Brighton: Late Hinshelwood own goal spoils Milner's record-matching appearance
postReview.description: James Milner became the Premier League's joint-leading appearance maker, but could not celebrate the milestone with a Brighton victory.

postReview.title: Aston Villa 1-0 Brighton: Un autogol tardío de Hinshelwood arruina el partido en el que Milner igualó el récord
postReview.description: James Milner igualó el récord de partidos en la historia de la Premier League, pero no pudo celebrar el hito con una victoria del Brighton.

postReview.title: Aston Villa-Brighton 1-0: Autogol nel finale di Hinshelwood rovina la presenza da record di Milner
postReview.description: James Milner ha agganciato il record di presenze in Premier League, ma non ha potuto festeggiare il traguardo con una vittoria del Brighton.

postReview.title: Aston Villa 1-0 Brighton: Gol contra de Hinshelwood no fim estraga jogo de Milner igualando recorde
postReview.description: James Milner igualou o recorde de jogos na Premier League, mas não conseguiu comemorar a marca com uma vitória do Brighton.

postReview.title: Aston Villa 1-0 Brighton : un CSC tardif de Hinshelwood gâche la soirée record de Milner
postReview.description: James Milner est devenu co-détenteur du record d’apparitions en Premier League, mais n’a pas pu fêter ce cap par une victoire de Brighton.

postReview.title: Aston Villa 1:0 Brighton: Spätes Eigentor von Hinshelwood verdirbt Milners rekordgleichen Einsatz
postReview.description: James Milner ist nun Rekordhalter bei den Premier-League-Einsätzen, konnte den Meilenstein aber nicht mit einem Sieg von Brighton feiern.

postReview.title: أستون فيلا 1-0 برايتون: هدف عكسي متأخر من هينشيلوود يفسد ليلة ميلنر التاريخية
postReview.description: عادل جيمس ميلنر الرقم القياسي لأكثر اللاعبين مشاركة في تاريخ الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز، لكنه لم يتمكن من الاحتفال بالإنجاز بفوز برايتون.

postReview.title: Aston Villa 1-0 Brighton: Autogolo tardio de Hinshelwood estraga jogo histórico de Milner
postReview.description: James Milner igualou o recorde de jogos na Premier League, mas não conseguiu assinalar a marca com uma vitória do Brighton.

preReview.title: Emery taking top-five battle game by game, says Villa have been 'more up than down'
preReview.description: Aston Villa drew 1-1 with Bournemouth on Saturday to further dent their already slim title hopes, with a top-five finish now their main aim.

preReview.title: Emery afronta la pelea por el top 5 partido a partido y dice que el Villa ha tenido más altos que bajos
preReview.description: El Aston Villa empató 1-1 con el Bournemouth el sábado y redujo aún más sus ya escasas opciones de título; ahora su gran objetivo es acabar entre los cinco primeros.

preReview.title: Emery affronta la corsa alla top five partita per partita: il Villa è stato «più su che giù»
preReview.description: Dopo l’1-1 di sabato con il Bournemouth, per l’Aston Villa le già minime speranze scudetto si riducono ancora: ora la priorità è chiudere tra le prime cinque.

preReview.title: Emery encara briga pelo top 5 jogo a jogo e diz que a temporada do Villa tem sido 'mais de altos do que de baixos'
preReview.description: O Aston Villa empatou por 1 a 1 com o Bournemouth no sábado e deixou suas já pequenas chances de título ainda mais remotas, com o top 5 agora como principal objetivo.

preReview.title: Emery nimmt den Kampf um die Top fünf Spiel für Spiel: Villa war „öfter oben als unten“
preReview.description: Aston Villa spielte am Samstag 1:1 gegen Bournemouth und kassierte damit den nächsten Dämpfer für die ohnehin geringen Titelchancen – nun geht es vor allem um einen Platz unter den Top fünf.

preReview.title: Emery aborde la lutte pour le top 5 match après match et juge la saison de Villa « plus positive que négative »
preReview.description: Le nul 1-1 concédé par Aston Villa à Bournemouth samedi a encore réduit ses déjà minces espoirs de titre, et la priorité est désormais de terminer dans le top 5.

preReview.title: إيمري يتعامل مع صراع المراكز الخمسة الأولى مباراة بمباراة: فيلا كان «أكثر صعوداً من هبوط»
preReview.description: تعادل أستون فيلا 1-1 مع بورنموث السبت، ليتلقى ضربة جديدة لآماله الضئيلة أصلاً في اللقب، لتصبح أولوية الفريق الآن إنهاء الموسم ضمن المراكز الخمسة الأولى.

preReview.title: Emery aborda luta pelo top-5 jogo a jogo e diz que o Villa tem tido mais altos do que baixos
preReview.description: Empate 1-1 com o Bournemouth deixa o top-5 como prioridade do Aston Villa

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
